ddls:
CREATE TABLE "migrations" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Surname of the individual or family */,
  "county" TEXT /* County of origin or destination */,
  "state_prov" TEXT /* State or province of origin or destination */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin or destination */,
  "begin_year" INTEGER /* Year the migration began */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the migration ended */,
  "migration_type" TEXT /* Type of migration (e.g., internal, international, forced, voluntary) */,
  "migration_reason" TEXT /* Reason for migration (e.g., economic, political, natural disaster) */,
  "source_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source region */,
  "destination_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination region */,
  "source_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source country */,
  "destination_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination country */,
  "migration_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the migration in years */,
  "migration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of migration (e.g., one-time, seasonal, permanent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_destination_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_source_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_source_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_destination_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_state_prov FOREIGN KEY ("state_prov") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Standardized country code */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country to which the region belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surname_data" (
  "surname_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surname */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Surname of the individual or family */,
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration associated with the surname */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual associated with the surname */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family associated with the surname */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surname_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surname_data_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surname_data_migration_id FOREIGN KEY ("migration_id") REFERENCES migrations ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surname_data_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the individual */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the family */,
  "family_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_family_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_head_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)
column_names: Surname of the individual or family
State or province of origin or destination
Type of migration (e.g., internal, international, forced, voluntary)
Reason for migration (e.g., economic, political, natural disaster)
Duration of the migration in years
Frequency of migration (e.g., one-time, seasonal, permanent)
Continent where the country is located
Area of the country in square kilometers
Country to which the region belongs
Area of the region in square kilometers

ID of the migration associated with the surname
ID of the individual associated with the surname
ID of the family associated with the surname
